description: Set flow knot conditions at boundaries.

keywords.name: discharge
keywords.description: Specify volumetric flow rate at flow knots within a specified range. The specified flow rate is cumulative, so the flow rate specified is added to the existing flow rate boundary condition. An optional proppant concentration may be specified for the injected fluid using the proppant keyword.

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: Set boundary pore pressure. Set boundary pore-pressure gradient with the optional keyword gradient (assumes that up is positive \(z\) -axis).

keywords.name: proppant-volume
keywords.description: Set the volumetric concentration of proppant in the injected fluid on the knots in the specified range. Fluid discharge boundary condition must exist for proppant to be injected.

keywords.name: proppant-mass
keywords.description: Set the mass concentration of proppant in the injected fluid on the knots in the specified range. Fluid discharge boundary condition must exist for proppant to be injected.

keywords.name: temperature
keywords.description: Set fixed fluid-boundary temperature at flow knots in the range.

keywords.name: flux
keywords.description: Set heat-flux boundary conditions for convection on flow pipes in the range.

keywords.name: kwd:fish
keywords.description: The specified FISH symbol is used to provide a multiplier.

keywords.name: kwd:table
keywords.description: Set the load multiplier from a table given by the table create command. The table must consist of a list of pairs: time, f(time). Linear interpolation is performed between the given discrete points.
